team.description: A senior engineering collective combining deep FinTech expertise, enterprise discipline, and a shared commitment to building Africa's digital infrastructure.

ceo.name: Saifoulaye Diallo
ceo.bio: Leads Manarix with a product-minded engineering vision, partnering with banks and fintechs to translate complex business goals into reliable digital platforms.

cto.name: Souleymane Diallo
cto.bio: Architects mission-critical systems with a focus on security, scalability, and long-term maintainability across payment and enterprise workloads.

engineering.bio: Drives engineering excellence through modern delivery practices, code quality standards, and high-performing cross-functional squads.

fintech.name: Aïssata Camara

cloud.name: Kwame Mensah
cloud.bio: Builds resilient AWS-native infrastructures with observability, automation, and cost efficiency at the core of every deployment.

delivery.name: Mariama Ba
delivery.bio: Ensures transparent communication, predictable delivery, and lasting client relationships from discovery through production support.

one.quote: Manarix delivered a payment integration architecture that reduced our time-to-market by months. Their technical depth and enterprise discipline set them apart.
one.author: Director of Technology

two.quote: From architecture review to production deployment, the team demonstrated the kind of reliability we expect from mission-critical partners.
two.author: Head of Digital Transformation

three.quote: They understood our regulatory constraints and built a platform that scales without compromising security or performance.
three.author: CTO

servicesHub.metaDescription: FinTech, enterprise software, cloud engineering, and technical advisory for organizations building mission-critical digital platforms across Africa.
servicesHub.title: Engineering Services
servicesHub.description: End-to-end capabilities to design, build, and scale the digital platforms your business depends on.

fintech.metaDescription: Secure payment infrastructures, mobile money integrations, wallet systems, and payment APIs engineered for Africa's financial ecosystem.
fintech.headline: FinTech & Payment Solutions
fintech.subheadline: Design and integrate secure payment infrastructures that connect banks, telcos, merchants, and end users across multiple rails.
challenges: Fragmented payment rails across markets and providers
Regulatory and compliance requirements for financial data
Legacy systems blocking fast product launches
deliverables: Mobile money and card provider integrations
Payment APIs and merchant onboarding flows

enterprise.metaDescription: Custom business applications, SaaS platforms, APIs, microservices, and legacy modernization built for scale across Africa.
enterprise.headline: Enterprise Software Engineering
enterprise.subheadline: Custom software solutions designed for performance, maintainability, and long-term growth in regulated environments.

cloud.metaDescription: AWS-native architectures, DevOps, CI/CD, and observability for resilient, growth-ready cloud platforms.
cloud.headline: Cloud & Platform Engineering
cloud.subheadline: Cloud-native infrastructures optimized for reliability, security, and cost efficiency as your platform scales.
deliverables: CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code

advisory.metaDescription: Architecture reviews, technical audits, CTO advisory, and system assessments for enterprise and fintech teams.
advisory.headline: Technical Advisory
advisory.subheadline: Strategic technology guidance to de-risk decisions, align engineering with business goals, and accelerate delivery.
challenges: Architecture not keeping pace with growth
deliverables: System design and vendor evaluation support

workHub.metaDescription: Representative engineering engagements demonstrating our approach to payment platforms, enterprise operations, and cloud modernization.
workHub.title: Selected Capabilities
workHub.description: How we approach complex, enterprise-grade engineering challenges — from architecture to production.

payment-platform.metaDescription: Multi-provider payment integration architecture for fintechs and financial institutions across Africa.
payment-platform.headline: Payment Platform
payment-platform.subheadline: Multi-provider payment integration architecture connecting mobile money, cards, and bank transfers behind a unified API.
payment-platform.context: A regional financial services group needed to launch digital payment products across multiple markets without rebuilding integrations for each provider.
payment-platform.approach: We designed a provider-agnostic orchestration layer with idempotent transaction handling, webhook normalization, and a reconciliation engine — enabling new rails to be added in weeks, not months.

operations-platform.metaDescription: Digital workflow automation and operations management platform for pan-African enterprises.
operations-platform.headline: Enterprise Operations Platform
operations-platform.subheadline: Digital workflow automation and management system replacing manual processes with traceable, scalable operations.
operations-platform.context: A pan-African enterprise relied on spreadsheets and email chains to manage cross-team workflows, creating delays and compliance risk.
operations-platform.approach: We built a modular operations platform with role-based access, configurable approval pipelines, document management, and real-time dashboards — integrated with existing ERP systems.
outcomes: Phased rollout without disrupting live operations

cloud-modernization.metaDescription: Migration of legacy applications to resilient, cloud-native AWS infrastructure with observability and automation.
cloud-modernization.headline: Cloud Modernization
cloud-modernization.subheadline: Migration of legacy applications to cloud-native infrastructure designed for resilience, observability, and growth.
cloud-modernization.context: A growing fintech needed to move off aging on-premise infrastructure to meet uptime SLAs and support rapid user growth.
cloud-modernization.approach: We executed a phased migration to AWS with containerized services, infrastructure as code, automated CI/CD, and comprehensive monitoring — minimizing downtime and de-risking each cutover.
outcomes: Deploy frequency increased from monthly to daily
Full observability across all production services

about.metaDescription: FinTech and enterprise software engineering team building Africa's digital infrastructure with ownership, precision, and impact.
about.title: About Manarix
about.description: We are a senior engineering collective partnering with banks, fintechs, and enterprises to build platforms that power Africa's digital economy.
about.mission: To engineer reliable, scalable digital platforms that help African organizations compete globally — combining local market insight with world-class engineering discipline.
about.vision: An Africa where every business, bank, and innovator has access to enterprise-grade technology built for their context, not imported without adaptation.

privacy.metaDescription: How Manarix Solutions collects, uses, and protects personal data submitted through our website and contact forms.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Manarix Solutions ("we", "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains how we handle personal information collected through manarix.com.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.body: When you submit our contact form, we collect your name, work email, company name, service interest, and project overview. We may also collect standard technical data such as browser type and IP address through server logs.

use.title: How we use your information
use.body: We use your information solely to respond to inquiries, schedule consultations, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: Contact inquiry data is retained for up to 24 months unless a business relationship is established, in which case data is retained as required for the engagement and applicable law.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at hello@manarix.com. We will respond within 30 days.

security.title: Security
security.body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including encrypted transmission (HTTPS) and access controls on internal systems.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, email us at hello@manarix.com.
